SHORT NAME: ELGBL_AFTR_EOY_IND 

LONG NAME: ELGBL_AFTR_EOY_IND 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

FILE(S): Annual DE base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual demographic and eligibility TAF 

VALUES: 0 = No 
1 = Yes 

COMMENT: This field is populated starting with the 2020 Release 1 RIF.
